description_long: This is a military-style SUV with a boxy, utilitarian design, painted in dark green with a large white star on the hood, reminiscent of classic army vehicles. The vehicle features a black, angular hardtop roof and matching black doors, with a visible spare tire mounted on the rear. The wheels are robust, with thick, rugged tires suitable for off-road use, and the body shows some wear and weathering, adding to its realistic appearance. The front grille is vertical and flanked by round headlights, while the windshield is wide and flat, providing good visibility. The side windows are rectangular, and the vehicle appears to have two main side doors for passenger access. The overall build suggests durability and functionality, ideal for both urban and rugged environments.
description: A rugged, military-style green SUV with a black hardtop, white star on the hood, and a rear-mounted spare tire. It features robust wheels, a boxy shape, and weathered details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile, with the white star on the hood, black hardtop, and visible spare tire at the rear.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the spare tire mounted on the back and the boxy, utilitarian rear design.
description_view_2: Side view from the right, mirroring the left side with the star on the hood and rugged wheel details.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the white star on the hood, round headlights, vertical grille, and wide windshield.
attribute_wheel_design: simple solid gray rims with a central hub and no visible spokes
